text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This morning, I had my fortune told by<n>
Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
She said taiyaki would lead me to the<n>one who
will show me the greatest<n>scenery...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't run into anybody so far...<n>Am I
supposed to be doing something<n>special?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Like... Feeding anyone who looks like<n>the right
person?
